Hero.Title: Full-Stack .NET Developer
Hero.Tagline: Building scalable web and desktop applications using ASP.NET Core and modern development practices.
AboutMe.Title: About Me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: I’m a Full-Stack .NET Developer with 3+ years of experience building enterprise-grade web and desktop applications.
I’ve delivered end-to-end systems like POS desktop apps, vendor portals, and centralized pricing platforms for both Indian and US-based clients.
My focus is clean architecture (SOLID, patterns), reliable APIs, and pragmatic UI/UX—so teams can ship faster and maintain confidently.
Skills.Title: Skills
Skills.Lead: A focused toolkit for building reliable enterprise applications across web, APIs, and desktop.
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: Associate Software Engineer (Full-Stack)
Description: Built a Centralized Pricing System from scratch using .NET Core MVC and SQL Server with multi-layer auth, OTP login, and parallel processing for performance.
Developed a US-based Graffiti platform with Google Maps polygon tools, repository pattern, and optimized MySQL queries.
Delivered a Vendor Portal (ASP.NET MVC) integrating REST APIs and ensuring consistent UI across modules.
Built and maintained a WPF POS desktop app with Entity Framework, fast UI for transactions, and production bug-fixing support.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Freelance & Contract Developer
Description: Custom ASP.NET Core web applications and REST API design/development.
Helped create and enhance a gym e-commerce website: product/catalog flows, UI refinements, performance improvements, and ongoing enhancements.
Desktop application development using WPF and .NET MAUI.
Third-party integrations (Google APIs and other services).
Database design, optimization, and migrations (SQL Server, MySQL).
Legacy .NET modernization, performance tuning, and ongoing support.

FeatureProjects.Title: My Projects
FeatureProjects.Label: Highlighted Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: PDF to Excel Report Converter (AI Extraction)
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Built an automated PDF-to-Excel reporting solution using Google Claude API and OpenAI API to accurately extract and normalize client data. Delivered both a console app and a Web API with job queue automation for the CRM team to process reports reliably at scale.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Centralized Pricing System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Built a secure centralized pricing management system from scratch with multi-layer authentication and OTP. Implemented REST APIs, parallel processing for concurrent updates, and an optimized SQL Server schema for high-volume queries.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Graffiti Management System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Developed a graffiti tracking platform for a US client with Google Maps integration and polygon marking to identify affected areas. Delivered a clean MVC architecture with Repository Pattern, modular design, and optimized MySQL queries.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Point of Sale (POS) System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Enhanced and maintained a Windows desktop POS system with a modern WPF UI, reliable transaction processing, and optimized database operations using Entity Framework and SQL Server. Added real-time analytics dashboards and integrations with existing business systems.

OtherProjects.Title: More Projects

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Gym E-commerce Website (Freelance)
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Helped build and enhance a gym e-commerce website, focusing on product/catalog flows, UI/UX polish, performance, and maintainability.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Vendor Portal Integration
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Collaborated on a .NET MVC-based vendor management portal with consistent UI/UX across modules and seamless API integrations for vendor onboarding and management workflows.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Candidate Management System
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Built a recruitment platform with candidate tracking, filtering, and profile management, plus an admin portal for job postings and user management.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Desktop Tools & Automation
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Delivered productivity-focused desktop utilities and automation scripts to streamline internal workflows and improve operational efficiency.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: API Integrations
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Implemented integrations with third-party services (including Google APIs) to connect enterprise systems and improve data accuracy and user experience.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Legacy System Modernization
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Modernized legacy .NET applications by refactoring toward clean architecture, improving performance, and delivering new modules with minimal downtime.

Contact.Title: Let’s talk
Contact.Content: Open for freelance and contract work. I focus on ASP.NET Core, APIs, integrations, and automation—shipping reliable features with clear communication.
Contact.Details: Remote-first, open to onsite (India) when needed
Contact.Note: Share a brief overview (goal, timeline, tech stack, and any constraints). I’ll reply with next steps and a clear plan.
